title: Wake lock keeps CPU on for 1 hr/session — will generate battery drain issues
description: PARTIAL_WAKE_LOCK with a 1-hour cap holds the CPU awake for the entire background session. On a public OSS project this will generate battery drain complaints and 1-star reviews from users who background the app and notice it in Android's battery breakdown. Neither the notification ('nie is running') nor the README mentions this trade-off. Maintenance consequence: recurring support issues; users who revoke battery permissions will silently lose WebSocket connectivity with no explanation in the UI.
close_reason: Notification text updated to explain battery use ('Keeping relay connected · tap to open'). Channel description updated to mention wake lock in Settings > App > Notifications.
